nasb.text: Have I sinned? What have I done to You, O watcher of men? Why have You set me as Your target, So that I am a burden to myself?

esv.text: If I sin, what do I do to you, you watcher of mankind? Why have you made me your mark? Why have I become a burden to you?

cnv.text: 鑒察世人的主啊！ 我若犯了罪，跟你有甚麼關係呢？ 你為甚麼把我當作箭靶， 使我以自己為重擔呢？

ccb.text: 鉴察世人的主啊， 我若犯了罪，又于你何妨？ 为何把我当成你的箭靶？ 难道我成了你的重担？
